criteria.confirmed_near_duplicate: same scene or graphic after resize, crop, compression, color adjustment, or text overlay
criteria.related_not_duplicate: same storm/event family but a materially different map, advisory, timestamp, or observation
criteria.template_not_duplicate: same layout with different story, timestamp, or source
criteria.phash_collision: visually distinct content sharing a low-frequency hash
criteria.mask_policy: only confirmed_near_duplicate rows are proposed for the robust evaluation mask
